items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: allocation framework

items.summary: The Standard Terms and Conditions for use in CfD Allocation Round 8 (AR8).

items.summary: Lists of standards, grant categories and grant levels that have been approved for the scheme.

items.summary: Household Energy Efficiency Statistics, headline release (May 2026).

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Resilient together, ASEAN’s path forward for sustainable and competitive global value chains

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Critical minerals in South Africa – Primer on mining policies and regulatory framework
items.summary: A high-level guide to South Africa’s mining policy and regulation that sets out the core laws and institutions, licensing and environmental requirements, and policy choices to attract investment in critical minerals.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Critical minerals in South Africa – Primer on the mining sector
items.summary: A 2-part accessible primer on South Africa’s mining sector that explains its economic importance, the end-to-end mine lifecycle and why responsible closure matters.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: Critical minerals in South Africa – Commodity primers
items.summary: Practical primers on bulk minerals and base metals, precious metals and specialty metals in South Africa, that sets out market context, supply dynamics and investment signals.

items.title: Guidance: Growth Gateway: ASEAN Economic Strategic Plan Review on Impact Realisation (ASPIRE)
items.summary: A review of ASEAN’s last decade of economic integration and a practical roadmap for its next ten years, including a plan on how to deepen UK-ASEAN partnership.

items.title: Call for input on goods for cost of living tariff suspensions
items.summary: We are seeking views on the tariff suspensions of agricultural goods, fertilisers, and kerosene to help mitigate the consumer impact of the conflict in the Middle East.
